## Verification

- [ ] `.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Offline report smoke test
- [ ] Factor report smoke test, if factor/strategy logic changed

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No `.env` file committed
- [ ] No API keys, SMTP passwords, or tokens committed
- [ ] No real holdings or account data committed
- [ ] No SQLite runtime database committed
- [ ] No generated reports, caches, or logs committed
- [ ] AI/Supervisor changes do not override deterministic risk rules
